prompt: Hold the deal until PG&E credit is rechecked, ask for collateral, and keep legal and credit on one internal review loop.
summary: Hold PG&E Financial Power trade EW9838 pending immediate credit recheck; require collateral; ensure Legal and Credit perform a joint internal review before any confirmation.

messages.subject: PG&E Financial Power Deal — HOLD pending credit/legal review
messages.body_text:
Mark,

Hold the PG&E Financial Power trade (EW9838) executed 5/11. Credit/Legal previously flagged this counterparty — do not confirm or settle. I am requesting an immediate credit recheck and that PG&E provide collateral (letter of credit or cash margin) pending clearance. Legal and Credit will review jointly; do not proceed until they clear the trade. Please acknowledge and pause any confirmations.

Sara
messages.rationale: Immediate stop to prevent confirmation while credit and legal reassess; requests collateral to limit exposure.

messages.subject: PG&E Financial Power Deal — Immediate credit recheck & collateral request
messages.body_text:
Tana,

Place the PG&E EW9838 trade on hold and perform an immediate credit re-evaluation of PG&E Energy Trading - Power L.P. Require PG&E to post collateral (LOC or cash margin) while we reassess. Coordinate directly with Legal (Rod) and copy me on all communications so we have a single Credit/Legal decision. Provide a written credit recommendation and proposed collateral terms within 24 hours.

Sara
messages.rationale: Directs Credit to re-evaluate counterparty and specify collateral; instructs coordination with Legal to ensure a single internal decision.

messages.subject: PG&E Financial Power Deal — Legal review & coordinate with Credit
messages.body_text:
Rod,

FYI/action: PG&E Financial Power trade EW9838 (5/11) has been placed on hold pending credit recheck. Please review legal exposure and documentation (including enforceability of any LOC) and coordinate with Tana so we produce a single Legal/Credit clearance or denial. Do not clear the trade until Legal and Credit jointly sign off.

Sara
messages.rationale: Brings Legal into the same review loop to review enforceability and to ensure a unified, documented legal/credit decision before proceeding.
